text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way back from an outing with Meisho
Doto, when she suddenly stops...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... it's a soft-serve parlor...
choice_data_list: Do you want some?
Do you want some?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep! Not at all! S-sorry it looked like that! I was
just a little curious...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Groooowl...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! This isn't what you think it is! I had a lot of
fun today, so naturally my stomach has gotten
empty and...
choice_data_list: Let's grab some for the road.
Let's grab some for the road.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We sh-shouldn't! I'll probably spill it or drop it
completely...
choice_data_list: That won't happen if we take our time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finding a seat on a park bench, I savor some
soft-serve ice cream with Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... This ice cream is delicious—cold, with the
gentle taste of milk...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I probably would have walked on by if you hadn't
said something, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Why?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... You see...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Soft-serve ice cream has always been a favorite
of mine. As a child, I used to beg my parents for
some whenever we went out together.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But it wouldn't last very long. I would accidentally
drop it, or a goat would snatch it straight from my
hands.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My parents never got upset. But I felt so bad
about it, I gradually stopped asking...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But with your help, I'm eating what is my first ice
cream in a long time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're always giving me the opportunity to pick
up the things I nearly gave up on...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So much so, I'm even starting to believe I'm
capable of doing more. Ridiculous, right?
choice_data_list: What kind of things do you want to try out?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Well... There are quite a lot of other things
I've thought about eating... or buying, but...
choice_data_list: Want to come shopping with me?
Want to come shopping with me?
Let's go on a little food tour!
Let's go on a little food tour!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Well... There are quite a lot of other things
I've thought about eating... or buying, but...
choice_data_list: Want to come shopping with me?
Want to come shopping with me?
Let's go on a little food tour!
Let's go on a little food tour!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... Shopping... together? With you? Um... But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Won't you get... irritated with me? What if I get
tired halfway through the trip?
choice_data_list: Tell me what you'd like to buy.
Tell me what you'd like to buy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to buy myself a coffee mug,
actually. There's an adorable round one I've been
eyeing, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm too scared to go on my own... I can picture
myself accidentally breaking their merchandise...
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I'll supervise things.
Don't worry, I'll supervise things.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Really? But, what if my hands start to shake from
the nerves, or... I'm not able to walk straight
anymore?
choice_data_list: I'll be by your side, trust me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Thank you so much. I'll see this through, I
promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that she's relaxed a bit. We manage to
wrap up our shopping detour with no hiccups.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I can't really walk and eat at the same time...
I'm sure to mess something up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Although... I do think it would be fun to go with
you, Trainer. So... it won't hurt to try, right?
choice_data_list: How about some croquettes?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Croquettes... those are crispy and delicious,
aren't they? The warm, meaty juices flood your
taste buds, but your hands and clothes get all
oily... Oogh...
choice_data_list: Then how about takoyaki, instead?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so good with takoyaki either... I've burned
my mouth so many times...
choice_data_list: Taiyaki's good too.
Taiyaki's good too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I never know where to bite first... Is the tail
better, or the head?!
choice_data_list: All right, let's have all three!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! Wait, sh-should we really? It sounds a
little overwhelming, but... Um!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Meisho Doto in rare high spirits, we explore
the shopping district trying all the foods that
pique our interest.
